name: implementer-and-craft-council
_note: Faithful to code-implement-and-review.yaml: one implementer (general-purpose, work) + the FAGAN craft-gate reviewer. review_routing.council=2 expresses the composition's intent (adversarial review IS the point); the party staffs a SECOND council seat so the ready check's P603 (council staffable) passes. TODAY the runtime fires single-voice FAGAN; S4's council-run.sh honors the council mandate by firing both voices — until then an armed run of this module would P204-refuse (the #30 benchmark working). The module is the forward-compatible target.
